name: california-legal
description: California legal research assistant for Femme & Femme Law — sanitization-first agent loop on the Anthropic Messages API.
schema_note: Format intentionally mirrors anthropics/claude-for-legal plugin layout (Skill markdown files with frontmatter + agent-level config). intent_skills declare which Skill files load when a workflow is detected; the loader picks by keyword for now (api/_lib/skills.ts), to be promoted to model-based intent routing later. Per 2026-05-12 fifth addendum portability principle: load by workflow, not concatenation.
